daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of grain measurer in and around Embervale Settlement, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Embervale Settlement workable through the obligations of grain measurer while managing the immediate pressure of overcrowding in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Embervale Settlement, that usually means carrying overcrowding, sickness, heat-failure risk without letting the role of grain measurer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Rothen Drillwake can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Rothen Drillwake can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Grain Measurer, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.

how_they_can_help: Rothen Drillwake can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
